chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-2021 / 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 9776/2023. 2) For hearing of main case. 07.09.2023. M/s. Imran Iqbal Khan & Aneel Zia, Advocates for Petitioner. Mr. G. M. Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Asif Ali Mian, Advocate for Respondent No. 3. Dr. Allah Ditta, Director, Plant & Protection Department. ________________ This petition was filed seeking directions to respondent No.2 to issue release order in respect of consignment covered by GD No. KAPE- HC-140087 dated 3.4.2023. Pursuant to directions contained in orders dated 19.05.2023 and 25.05.2023, the Respondent Department has heard the Petitioner and decided the matter, whereas, such proceedings have been placed on record by way of report of personal hearing. A separate Office order dated 17.5.2023 has also been issued, whereby, the request of the Petitioner has been regretted with detailed reasons. This apparently has served the purpose of this petition as goods have also been permitted to be shifted to a bonded warehouse. While confronted, petitioners Counsel submit that no order has been issued to the petitioner as yet. Be that as it may, since an order has been passed as directed, the Respondent Department is directed to issue fresh copy of order dated 17.5.2023 to the Petitioner within a weeks’ time. The Petitioner, if aggrieved, may seek remedy against the said order, as may be available in law. Petition stands disposed of in these terms. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
